alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions; demonstrated ownership of scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs with cross-functional stakeholder management
alignments.job_requirement: Own and manage defined workstreams within Checkout's GRC programme, including PCI DSS v4.0.1, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and relevant regulatory obligations

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial operations transformation experience involving process design, control implementation, and business-stakeholder coordination; not domain-specific GRC evidence
alignments.job_requirement: Coordinate control evidence collection activities across internal teams, ensuring continuous audit readiness

alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced Excel and Google Sheets; SQL and BigQuery proficiency for data analysis and reporting; experience designing systems and specifications
alignments.job_requirement: Maintain and improve GRC documentation including policies, standards, procedures, and control matrices

alignments.candidate_evidence: Cross-functional stakeholder engagement across Google Devices; experience translating business requirements into systems and processes; Salesforce administration and partnership with engineering teams
alignments.job_requirement: Work closely with Engineering, Product, Legal, Procurement, and Finance to embed security and compliance requirements into processes

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google suggesting leadership progression; no explicit team leadership, mentoring, or people-management experience documented
alignments.job_requirement: Provide guidance and day-to-day support to junior analysts, contributing to their development

alignments.candidate_evidence: No documented experience with information security compliance frameworks, GRC, IT audit, payments compliance, or fintech regulatory requirements
alignments.job_requirement: Practical working knowledge of PCI DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and familiarity with DORA, NIST CSF, or EU AI Act

gaps.gap: No GRC, information security compliance, IT audit, or payments/fintech regulatory background
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has process-design and stakeholder-management foundations that could transfer, but domain re-skilling on PCI DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, DORA, and payment-industry compliance would require significant time and external training.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience with external audits, QSA liaisons, or evidence collation workflows
gaps.mitigation: Audit-readiness and third-party assessor coordination are core to the role; no direct evidence in commercial operations or business transformation work.

gaps.gap: No team leadership or explicit mentoring experience documented
gaps.mitigation: Role requires day-to-day guidance to L1 and L2 analysts; candidate profile does not detail direct reports or coaching activities.

gaps.gap: No cloud GRC, GRC tooling, risk platforms, or compliance-automation hands-on experience
gaps.mitigation: Preferred qualifications; candidate has BI/reporting tools (Looker, Tableau) and data-query skills but not compliance-specific platforms.

output.level_rationale: 2–4 years required, independent workstream ownership, junior-analyst mentoring, and audit-liaison scope suggest L4 IC-track or junior manager. Payments-fintech domain and regulatory-framework depth anchor mid-career specialist level. Company stage unstated. typical fintech scale does not elevate baseline.".
output.summary: This is an Information Security Analyst II (GRC) role requiring 2–4 years of hands-on governance, risk, and compliance experience in payments or fintech—specifically PCI DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and emerging regulatory frameworks (DORA, EU AI Act). The candidate brings strong process-design, stakeholder-engagement, and cross-functional transformation skills from eight years in Commercial Operations at Google, but lacks any documented background in information security compliance, IT audit, external audit support, or payment-industry regulatory obligations. While foundational project ownership and communication skills are present, domain knowledge and audit-readiness coordination are critical and absent, making this a fundamental mismatch despite seniority alignment.
uncertainties: Candidate profile does not specify explicit team leadership, direct reports, or mentoring track record—unclear whether two promotions included people management
No indication whether candidate has security, risk, or compliance certifications (CISA, CISM, PCIP, etc.)
Checkout.com company size/stage inferred as mid-to-large fintech from transaction volume, but exact regulatory footprint and GRC-program scale not stated in role JSON
No evidence of cloud GRC, risk-platform, or compliance-automation tool ownership
